data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah ;  Perak  (Larut, Matang and Selama, Hulu Perak, Bagan Datuk, Hilir Perak, Batang Padang and Muallim);  Terengganu  (Kuala Nerus, Hulu Terengganu, Kuala Terengganu, Marang and Dungun);  Pahang  (Raub, Bentong, Temerloh, Bera, Pekan and Rompin);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor, Gombak and Petaling);  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  Johor  (Kluang, Mersing and Kota Tinggi);  Sarawak:  Sibu (Kanowit), Kapit (Song) and Miri (Subis and Beluru); and  Sabah:  Interior (Sipitang), West Coast (Kota Belud), Tawau (Lahad Datu), Sandakan (Kinabatangan) and Kudat (Kota Marudu and Pitas) until 8:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah ;  Perak  (Larut, Matang Dan Selama, Hulu Perak, Bagan Datuk, Hilir Perak, Batang Padang dan Muallim);  Terengganu  (Kuala Nerus, Hulu Terengganu, Kuala Terengganu, Marang dan Dungun);  Pahang  (Raub, Bentong, Temerloh, Bera, Pekan dan Rompin);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor, Gombak dan Petaling);  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  Johor  (Kluang, Mersing dan Kota Tinggi);  Sarawak:  Sibu (Kanowit), Kapit (Song) dan Miri (Subis dan Beluru); dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Sipitang), Pantai Barat (Kota Belud), Tawau (Lahad Datu), Sandakan (Kinabatangan) dan Kudat (Kota Marudu dan Pitas) sehingga 8:00 malam; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Northern Sarawak and Eastern Sabah until 9:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak Utara dan Sabah Timur sehingga 9:00 malam; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, northern part of Bunguran, southwestern part of Reef North and Sulu until 9:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, utara Bunguran, barat daya Reef North dan Sulu sehingga 9:00 malam; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.
